accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; procedural description is accurate.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution disapproves the D.C. policing and justice reform act.

changes_to_existing_law.why: No amendment to existing federal law.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions or conditions present.

effective_dates.why: No explicit effective date beyond enactment.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the single operative disapproval provision accurately.

concise.why: Appropriately concise for the scope of the resolution.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies D.C. Act 24-781, section 602(c)(1) of the Home Rule Act, and the committee.

correct_figures.why: All dates and references match the bill text.
